fieldHelp.itemCode: Unique code identifying the item within MES.
fieldHelp.itemNo: Part number used in drawings, ERP, and customer documents.
fieldHelp.itemName: Item name used for identification on the floor.
fieldHelp.custPartNo: Part number used by the customer.
fieldHelp.rev: Revision of the item drawing or specification.
fieldHelp.markingText: Marking text sent to labels and marking equipment.
fieldHelp.itemType: MES flow classification such as raw material, WIP, or finished goods.
fieldHelp.productType: Code indicating the item group or product family.
fieldHelp.modelName: Item attribute distinguishing the vehicle model.
fieldHelp.spec: Supplementary description such as item spec, dimensions.
fieldHelp.color: Item color information such as wire color.
fieldHelp.inspectMethod: Distinguishes IQC inspection or skip-inspection method.
fieldHelp.sampleQty: Default sample count for IQC inspection. Separate from the AQL-derived sample size.
fieldHelp.iqcAqlPolicyCode:
AQL (Acceptable Quality Limit) policy applied to this item's incoming inspection (IQC).

• What AQL is: the maximum defect level at which a lot is still accepted. Lower values mean stricter criteria.
• Policy makeup: each policy bundles a Major (critical) and Minor AQL value per defect grade plus an inspection level (usually II).
• How it judges: on incoming lot inspection it derives the sample size (n) and accept (Ac)/reject (Re) numbers from the lot size — defects ≤ Ac pass, ≥ Re fail.
• Where to set up: manage policies and per-lot criteria under [Quality > AQL Standards].
• If left empty: automatic AQL judgment is not applied (no inspection or manual judgment).
fieldHelp.useYn: Whether the item is available for lookup, selection, and use.
fieldHelp.boxQty: Reference quantity packed in one box. Choose a multiple of 10 or enter directly.
fieldHelp.minPackQty: Quantity treated as the minimum unit when issuing material.
fieldHelp.lotUnitQty: Reference quantity for handling production WIP in bundle units.
fieldHelp.safetyStock: Reference quantity used to judge stock shortage.
fieldHelp.expiryDate: Validity period in days based on receipt or manufacture.
fieldHelp.expiryExtDays: Maximum days the validity period can be extended after quality review.
fieldHelp.packUnit: Composition basis for the pallet or upper packaging unit.
fieldHelp.storageLocation: Default storage location fixed per item.
fieldHelp.imageUrl: File path of the item image.

aql.title: AQL Standards
aql.subtitle: Manage AQL standards used to calculate IQC sample size and Ac/Re criteria.
aql.policySectionDesc: Manage Major/Minor AQL combinations applied to items based on IQC_AQL_POLICIES.
aql.ruleEmpty: Add judgment rules by LOT quantity.
aql.validateLotRange: LOT quantity From cannot exceed To.
aql.validateReAc: Re must be greater than Ac.

fieldHelp.policyCode: AQL policy code referenced by ITEM_MASTERS.IQC_AQL_POLICY_CODE. Items store only this policy code, not individual inspection level or Major/Minor AQL values, ensuring consistent inspection criteria combinations.
fieldHelp.policyName: Display name for identifying the policy on the shop floor. Write it so operators can understand the policy scope, e.g. by customer, vehicle/model group, or inspection severity.
fieldHelp.policyInspectionLevel: Inspection level applied to this policy. This is a policy-level criterion, not per-item input, and forms the basis of IQC sampling judgment together with Major/Minor AQL criteria.
fieldHelp.policyMajorAqlCode: AQL standard code for Major defect judgment. Selectable from active AQL_STANDARDS.AQL_CODE. The selected standard provides LOT range-based sampleSize/Ac/Re rules for Major defect judgment.
fieldHelp.policyMinorAqlCode: AQL standard code for Minor defect judgment. Selectable from active AQL_STANDARDS.AQL_CODE. Applies sampleSize/Ac/Re rules for Minor defect counts separately from Major.
fieldHelp.policyUseYn: Whether this AQL policy is active. If N, excluded from new item assignment selection. Policies already assigned to items cannot be deactivated from this screen.
fieldHelp.aqlCode: Code identifying the AQL sampling standard itself. Not directly referenced by items, but referenced by AQL policies (IQC_AQL_POLICIES.MAJOR_AQL_CODE or MINOR_AQL_CODE) as the basis for Major/Minor judgment.
fieldHelp.aqlName: Name of the AQL standard. Displayed for inspectors and managers to identify the standard in lists (e.g. Normal Inspection AQL 1.0).
fieldHelp.inspectionLevel: ISO 2859-1 inspection level. General levels I, II, III (II is standard) and special levels S-1 through S-4. Together with lot size, determines the sample size code letter (quantity to sample).
fieldHelp.aqlValue: Acceptable Quality Limit value. The maximum nonconforming percentage (%) or nonconformities per 100 units for considering a lot acceptable. Smaller values indicate stricter criteria.
fieldHelp.useYn: Whether this AQL standard is active. If N, excluded from Major/Minor criterion selection in AQL policies (existing history remains unchanged).
fieldHelp.remark: Reference note for the AQL standard. Freely record the basis of application, customer requirements, revision history, etc.
fieldHelp.lotQtyFrom: Starting value of the lot quantity range to which this sampling rule applies. When the receipt/inspection lot quantity falls within the From~To range, the sample size and judgment criteria of this row apply.
fieldHelp.lotQtyTo: Ending value of the lot quantity range to which the sampling rule applies. Ranges cannot overlap and cannot be smaller than From.
fieldHelp.sampleSize: Number of samples to randomly extract and inspect for the given lot quantity range. Corresponds to the ISO 2859-1 sample size code letter.
fieldHelp.acceptQty: Acceptance number (Ac). If the number of nonconformities found in the samples is equal to or less than this value, the lot is accepted.
fieldHelp.rejectQty: Rejection number (Re). If the number of nonconformities found in the samples is equal to or greater than this value, the lot is rejected. Must always be greater than Ac (usually Ac+1).

ARRIVAL_RESULT_STATUS.ARRIVED: Goods arrived and registered, awaiting inspection
ARRIVAL_RESULT_STATUS.IQC_PROGRESS: Incoming inspection of arrived goods in progress
ARRIVAL_RESULT_STATUS.RECEIVED: Received into stock and reflected in inventory

AUDIT_RESULT.OFI: Opportunity for improvement, not a nonconformity

AUDIT_STATUS.COMPLETED: Audit fieldwork completed, results pending wrap-up
AUDIT_STATUS.CLOSED: Audit closed after all findings resolved

BOX_STATUS.OPEN: Box open; items can still be added
BOX_STATUS.CLOSED: Box closed; no more items can be added, ready for receipt/shipment
BOX_STATUS.SHIPPED: Box has been shipped out of the plant

CAL_RESULT.FAIL: Calibration result failed out of tolerance

CAPA_ACTION_STATUS.PENDING: Action item is pending and not yet started

CAPA_STATUS.OPEN: CAPA case has been opened and registered
CAPA_STATUS.ACTION_PLANNED: Corrective action plan has been established
CAPA_STATUS.IN_PROGRESS: Corrective actions are being carried out
CAPA_STATUS.VERIFYING: Effectiveness of actions is being verified
CAPA_STATUS.CLOSED: CAPA case has been closed after verification

COMPLAINT_STATUS.RESPONDING: Responding to the customer is in progress
COMPLAINT_STATUS.CLOSED: Complaint has been closed after resolution

CONNECTION_STATUS.CONNECTED: Connection to the target is established
CONNECTION_STATUS.DISCONNECTED: Connection has been lost or closed

CONSUMABLE_OPER_STATUS.REPAIR: Under repair due to fault or maintenance

CON_STOCK_STATUS.PENDING: Consumable not yet received into stock
CON_STOCK_STATUS.ACTIVE: In stock and available for use
CON_STOCK_STATUS.MOUNTED: Mounted on equipment and in use

CP_STATUS.OBSOLETE: Control Plan obsolete, superseded or retired

CUSTOMER_PO_PROGRESS.PARTIAL_SHIP: Partially shipped relative to the order
CUSTOMER_PO_PROGRESS.OVERDUE: Past due date; fulfillment is delayed

CUSTOMER_PO_STATUS.RECEIVED: Customer PO received but not yet confirmed
CUSTOMER_PO_STATUS.CONFIRMED: PO reviewed and confirmed, ready for production
CUSTOMER_PO_STATUS.IN_PRODUCTION: Production underway for the PO quantity
CUSTOMER_PO_STATUS.PARTIAL_SHIP: Only part of the PO quantity has shipped
CUSTOMER_PO_STATUS.SHIPPED: Full PO quantity has been shipped

CUSTOMS_ENTRY_STATUS.CLEARED: Customs cleared and ready for release
CUSTOMS_ENTRY_STATUS.RELEASED: Released from bonded area after clearance

DEFECT_DISPOSITION.REPAIR: Disposition to repair the defective item
DEFECT_DISPOSITION.REWORK: Disposition to rework the defective item
DEFECT_DISPOSITION.SCRAP: Disposition to scrap the defective item
DEFECT_DISPOSITION.CONCESSION: Disposition to accept the defect under concession

DEFECT_LOG_STATUS.WAIT: Defect log registered and awaiting action

DEFECT_STATUS.PENDING: Defect registered and waiting for repair

DOC_STATUS.DRAFT: Document being drafted, not yet reviewed
DOC_STATUS.APPROVED: Document approved and officially in effect
DOC_STATUS.OBSOLETE: Document obsolete and no longer valid

EQUIP_STATUS.MAINT: Equipment is under maintenance or inspection
EQUIP_STATUS.STOP: Equipment is stopped and not running
EQUIP_STATUS.INTERLOCK: Equipment locked out by an interlock condition

FAI_RESULT.CONDITIONAL: FAI result accepted subject to conditions

FAI_STATUS.REQUESTED: First Article Inspection requested and logged
FAI_STATUS.PASS: FAI passed; mass production can proceed

FINDING_STATUS.OPEN: Finding raised but not yet addressed
FINDING_STATUS.IN_PROGRESS: Corrective action for the finding in progress

GAUGE_STATUS.ACTIVE: Gauge is calibrated and in active use

IF_LOG_STATUS.RETRY: Interface is being retried after failure

INSPECT_JUDGE.PASS: Inspector judged the item as pass
INSPECT_JUDGE.FAIL: Inspector judged the item as fail
INSPECT_JUDGE.CONDITIONAL: Judged conditional pass pending conditions met

INSPECT_RESULT.PASS: Met inspection criteria and recorded as pass
INSPECT_RESULT.FAIL: Failed to meet inspection criteria; rejected

INTERFACE_STATUS.PENDING: Waiting to be sent to the external system
INTERFACE_STATUS.SENT: Data has been sent to the external system
INTERFACE_STATUS.FAILED: Transmission to the external system failed
INTERFACE_STATUS.CONFIRMED: Receipt confirmed by the counterpart system

IQC_STATUS.PASS: Passed IQC; available for stock and use
IQC_STATUS.FAIL: Failed IQC; subject to return or quarantine
IQC_STATUS.HOLD: Held pending further review; not usable yet

ISSUE_STATUS.PENDING: Issue request registered and awaiting processing

JOB_ORDER_STATUS.WAITING: Job order created and waiting to be released to the line
JOB_ORDER_STATUS.RUNNING: Job order released to line and in production
JOB_ORDER_STATUS.HOLD: Job order temporarily suspended due to an issue
JOB_ORDER_STATUS.DONE: Ordered quantity produced and the job is finished
JOB_ORDER_STATUS.CANCELED: Job order canceled and will not be produced

JUDGE_YN.Y: Indicates the judgment outcome is pass
JUDGE_YN.N: Indicates the judgment outcome is fail

MAT_LOT_STATUS.NORMAL: Normal lot, passed inspection and available for use
MAT_LOT_STATUS.HOLD: On hold; use suspended pending quality review
MAT_LOT_STATUS.DEPLETED: Fully consumed; no remaining quantity left
MAT_LOT_STATUS.SPLIT: Split into child lots; original lot closed
MAT_LOT_STATUS.MERGED: Merged into another lot; original lot closed

MOLD_LIFE_STATUS.NORMAL: Crimp mold life is within a healthy range
MOLD_LIFE_STATUS.WARNING: Mold life is nearing its limit, warning
MOLD_LIFE_STATUS.REPLACE: Mold has reached end of life and needs replacement
MOLD_LIFE_STATUS.MAINT: Mold is under inspection for life management

MOLD_STATUS.INACTIVE: Mold is stored and not in use
MOLD_STATUS.SCRAPPED: Mold has been scrapped and retired

OQC_STATUS.IN_PROGRESS: Outgoing quality check currently in progress

PALLET_STATUS.OPEN: Pallet open; boxes can still be loaded onto it
PALLET_STATUS.CLOSED: Pallet closed; no more boxes can be loaded
PALLET_STATUS.LOADED: Pallet loaded onto vehicle/container for shipping
PALLET_STATUS.SHIPPED: Pallet has been shipped out of the plant

PM_STATUS.SCHEDULED: Preventive maintenance is scheduled and pending
PM_STATUS.OVERDUE: Maintenance is past its due date and overdue

PM_WO_STATUS.PLANNED: Maintenance work order is planned and pending
PM_WO_STATUS.IN_PROGRESS: Work order is currently in progress
PM_WO_STATUS.OVERDUE: Work order is overdue past its deadline

PO_LINE_STATUS.OPEN: Open line; no goods received yet
PO_LINE_STATUS.PARTIAL: Partially received; remaining quantity still open
PO_LINE_STATUS.CLOSE: Line closed; receipt for item complete

PO_STATUS.DRAFT: Draft purchase order, not yet confirmed
PO_STATUS.CONFIRMED: Purchase order confirmed and awaiting receipt
PO_STATUS.PARTIAL: Partially received; some quantity still open

PPAP_STATUS.APPROVED: PPAP approved by customer; production allowed
PPAP_STATUS.INTERIM: Interim approval granted pending full approval

PRODUCT_HOLD_STATUS.NORMAL: Product is normal and available for use or shipment
PRODUCT_HOLD_STATUS.HOLD: Product put on hold and blocked from shipment

PROD_PLAN_STATUS.CONFIRMED: Production plan confirmed and ready to execute
PROD_PLAN_STATUS.CLOSED: Plan period ended and closed out

PROD_RESULT_STATUS.RUNNING: Production result registered and work in progress
PROD_RESULT_STATUS.DONE: Production for this result completed and closed
PROD_RESULT_STATUS.CANCELED: Production result canceled after being voided

QUALITY_JUDGMENT.PASS: Judged conforming; may proceed to next step
QUALITY_JUDGMENT.FAIL: Judged nonconforming; requires hold or disposition
QUALITY_JUDGMENT.PENDING: Inspection done but final judgment not yet decided
QUALITY_JUDGMENT.CONDITIONAL: Conditionally accepted subject to specific conditions

RECEIVE_STATUS.PENDING: Arrived and awaiting incoming quality inspection
RECEIVE_STATUS.PASSED: Passed IQC; cleared for warehouse receipt
RECEIVE_STATUS.FAILED: Failed IQC; receipt blocked for disposition

REPAIR_DISPOSITION.SCRAP: Disposition to scrap the repair item
REPAIR_DISPOSITION.REUSE: Disposition to reuse the item as is

REPAIR_RESULT.COMPLETED: Repair finished and processed as complete
REPAIR_RESULT.IMPOSSIBLE: Repair not possible due to the defect
REPAIR_RESULT.SCRAP: Judged for scrap instead of repair

REWORK_STATUS.REGISTERED: Rework item registered as initial state
REWORK_STATUS.QC_PENDING: Waiting for QC approval of the rework
REWORK_STATUS.PROD_PENDING: Waiting for production approval of the rework
REWORK_STATUS.APPROVED: Rework fully approved by QC and production
REWORK_STATUS.SCRAP: Judged for scrap as rework is not viable

SCHED_STATUS.FAIL: Scheduled job failed with an error
SCHED_STATUS.RETRYING: Job is retrying after a failure
SCHED_STATUS.TIMEOUT: Job stopped after exceeding the time limit

SEMI_PRODUCT_STATUS.WAITING: Semi-product waiting for the next process
SEMI_PRODUCT_STATUS.IN_PROGRESS: Semi-product being processed in the line
SEMI_PRODUCT_STATUS.MOVED: Completed semi-product moved to next process or store

SHIPMENT_STATUS.PREPARING: Gathering items and preparing the shipment
SHIPMENT_STATUS.LOADED: Shipment fully loaded onto the vehicle
SHIPMENT_STATUS.SHIPPED: Vehicle has left the plant; transport started
SHIPMENT_STATUS.DELIVERED: Shipment arrived and delivered to the customer
SHIPMENT_STATUS.CANCELED: Shipment was canceled and not carried out

SHIP_ORDER_STATUS.DRAFT: Ship order being drafted, not yet confirmed
SHIP_ORDER_STATUS.CONFIRMED: Ship order confirmed; picking can begin
SHIP_ORDER_STATUS.SHIPPING: Shipping in progress against the order
SHIP_ORDER_STATUS.SHIPPED: All ordered quantity has been shipped
SHIP_ORDER_STATUS.CLOSED: Ship order closed; no further processing

SPC_STATUS.ACTIVE: SPC monitoring is active for this item

SUBCON_INSPECT_RESULT.PARTIAL: Only part of the subcontractor lot passed

USAGE_REPORT_STATUS.DRAFT: Draft usage report, not yet submitted

prep.noDailyInspectItemsTitle: No equipment daily inspection items assigned for this equipment.
prep.dailyInspectAssignStep1: If no inspection items exist, first register DAILY-type items in Master Data > Equipment Inspection Item Master (/master/equip-inspect-item).
prep.dailyInspectAssignStep2: From the left menu, go to Master Data > Equipment Inspection Items (/master/equip-inspect).
prep.dailyInspectAssignStep3: Select this kiosk equipment from the equipment list on the left.
prep.dailyInspectAssignStep4: Set the inspection type to Equipment Daily Inspection (DAILY).
prep.dailyInspectAssignStep5: Click Add Inspection Item, select the needed items, and save.
prep.dailyInspectAssignStep6: Close and reopen this dialog to see the assigned items.
prep.selectJobOrderFirst: Please select a work order first.
prep.noWorkerInspectItemsTitle: No worker equipment inspection items assigned for this equipment.
prep.workerInspectAssignStep1: From the left menu, go to Master Data > Equipment Inspection Items (/master/equip-inspect).
prep.workerInspectAssignStep2: Select this kiosk equipment from the equipment list on the left.
prep.workerInspectAssignStep3: Set the inspection type to Worker Equipment Inspection (WORKER).
prep.workerInspectAssignStep4: Click Add Inspection Item, select the needed items, and save.
prep.workerInspectAssignStep5: Close and reopen this dialog to see the assigned items.

workerInspect.check1: Equipment power and safety devices normal

selfInspect.destructiveWarning: Destructive test items included. Material will be deducted on sampling.

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.placeholder: Ask anything. I'll help with MES operations.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
chat.embeddingDegradedHint: Semantic search is disabled because no embedding API key is set. Register an AI embedding key in System Config.

config.keySetPlaceholder: Configured — enter a new key to change

catalog.title: AI Table Catalog
catalog.desc: Table knowledge injected into AI queries. Adding descriptions and column relations (JOIN keys) improves text-to-SQL accuracy.
catalog.format: Format: "## TABLE — description" / "동의어: a, b" (synonyms) / "관계:" then "- COLUMN -> TARGET_TABLE.COLUMN"
catalog.empty: Empty. Use 'Sync with DB' to populate tables.
catalog.selectTable: Select a table on the left.
catalog.noRelation: No relations. Use 'Add relation' to define JOIN keys.
